ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, moderator, admin) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_active" TEXT /* Date the user was last active on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the game was released */,
  "developer" TEXT /* Name of the game developer */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the game (e.g., action, adventure, role-playing) */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of the game based on user reviews */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "platforms" (
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each platform */,
  "platform_name" TEXT /* Name of the platform (e.g., PC, Console, Mobile) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the platform */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of platform (e.g., console, pc, mobile, web) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("platform_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the comment is about */,
  "platform_id" INTEGER /* ID of the platform where the comment was posted */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the user comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was posted */,
  "rating" REAL /* User rating of the game (e.g., 1-5 stars) */,
  "edited" INTEGER /* Whether the comment has been edited */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_platform_id FOREIGN KEY ("platform_id") REFERENCES platforms ("platform_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment score entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being analyzed */,
  "vader_score" REAL /* Sentiment score from the VADER model */,
  "vader_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label from the VADER model (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "textblob_score" REAL /* Sentiment score from the TextBlob model */,
  "textblob_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label from the TextBlob model (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "bert_score" REAL /* Sentiment score from the BERT model */,
  "bert_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label from the BERT model (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  "overall_sentiment" TEXT /* Overall sentiment label (e.g., Positive, Negative, Neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_scores_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., approve, delete, flag) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the moderation action (e.g., successful, failed, pending) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being replied to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "reply_text" TEXT /* Text of the reply */,
  "reply_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the reply was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_replies_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being reported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the report */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the report (e.g., harassment, spam, hate speech) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the ticket */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game related to the ticket */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "ticket_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the ticket was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
